sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for Genesis port

special_mechanics.name: Combo System
special_mechanics.description: Chain combos could be started by using a jump punch (vertical or angled) or a vertical jump kick, creating more opportunities to use combos. Combos that knock opponents in the air no longer send opponent to level above in multi-layered levels; only regular uppercuts do this.

special_mechanics.name: Backflip
special_mechanics.description: Characters can backflip away from opponents, and jumping during backflip triggers AI vulnerabilities

special_mechanics.name: Stage Fatality (Scorpion's Lair)
special_mechanics.description: Uppercut can send opponent into river of lava

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay mechanics documentation but no precise physics parameters (velocities, acceleration values, gravity constants, sub-pixel precision data). Fighting game genre documentation focuses on mechanical systems rather than movement parameters.
